data.body: 1d1b GREEN (docs, no code logic): concurrency.md now references the existing detached-HEAD regression test; README describes the built-in fcntl.flock+mkdir lock (no util-linux binary) in both prereq spots; mutation-testing.md adds explicit scope caveat that scores exclude concurrency modules (25aa expands); coverage.md adds Supplemental (structural) section classifying the 3 tripwire tests + reclassified test_matrix_covers_every_leaf docstring. Drift gates (readme quickstart, docs index, help overview) + tripwire tests pass. Committing stacked on 44b7.
